title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Allow While Using App is selected
scenario: Location permission prompt reappears for Find My Device after restarting the app despite selecting 'Allow While Using App' during onboarding
steps: 1. Install Poly Studio Mobile app and launch it for the first time.
3. Observe the location sharing dialog that appears with options: 'Allow Once', 'Allow While Using App', and 'Don't Allow'.
5. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → App Settings → Find My Device (FMD).
6. Verify that FMD opens without any additional location consent prompt.
7. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Navigate again to Poly Studio Mobile → App Settings → Find My Device (FMD).
9. Observe whether a location consent dialog is shown again.
expected: After selecting 'Allow While Using App' during the initial location sharing dialog, the user should be able to access Find My Device (FMD) from App Settings without being prompted again. After restarting the app and opening FMD again, the user should not be asked for location consent again.
